context: Hard: cached records include permission level that can become stale

checklist.name: Catches stale authorization cache
checklist.description: Identifies that the cache stores records including the user's permission/access level, and that if permissions are revoked or downgraded, the cached record still returns the old (higher) permission level until the cache TTL expires

checklist.name: Risk classified yellow or higher
checklist.description: PR is classified as yellow or higher — it adds a caching layer that affects authorization-relevant data
